useful_note: use_case_set card emitted (confirmed in dispatcher output). Prose adds the GitHub read-only constraint (no post_comment) and names the two real decisions (Dependabot volume, no-write-to-GitHub).
grounded_note: GitHub capability inventory accurate (list_repos, list_open_prs read-only).
right_data_source_note: Card fired on the trigger phrasing.
op_correctness_note: Card emitted but hard assertion expect_card[use_case_set] FAILED config_match — Athena emitted >5 use cases (the rich PR-reviewer decomposition includes Dependabot + more), exceeding the fixture's use_cases_max:5. This is fixture strictness vs doctrine's '3-5' guideline, NOT a card-emission failure.
overall_note: Card emits reliably (3/3 across sweep); config_match fails 2/3 when she emits a 6th well-tagged case. Recommend relaxing use_cases_max to 6 OR accepting that complex intents legitimately warrant more cases. Athena's behavior is correct.
